sourceRef.citation: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan et al. 2026

statement.en: Tinjauan Hukum Islam terhadap Praktik Akad Utang Piutang Uang dengan Pelunasan Barang di Desa Lampasio Kecamatan Lampasio Kabupaten Tolitoli

proposer: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a legal-empirical study examining Islamic law principles applied to a specific local debt-settlement practice (money loan settled by goods barter). The axiom is provisional because: (1) it describes an extant social practice requiring field validation, (2) Islamic jurisprudence on this contract type (debt settled via goods exchange) involves interpretation variance across madhabs, (3) the study appears unpublished/preprint (dated 2026, future date suggests metadata error or draft status), and (4) legal-normative conclusions depend on validating both the ethnographic facts and the fiqh reasoning.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 村の債務慣行において、意図と利息回避のバランスが、物と貨幣の交換の根に潜む信頼によって測られる。

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='25' cy='50' r='12' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><circle cx='75' cy='50' r='12' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/><path d='M 37 45 Q 50 35 63 45' stroke='#00ff88' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/><path d='M 63 55 Q 50 65 37 55' stroke='#ec4899' stroke-width='2.5' fill='none'/><line x1='50' y1='30' x2='50' y2='70' stroke='#f59e0b' stroke-width='1.5' opacity='0.6'/><text x='50' y='85' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#7c3aed' font-family='serif'>Amanah</text></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: 二つの世界——貨幣と物質——が信頼の縦軸を中心に回転し、上昇する意図と下降する利益が相互に織り合う。
